parsed_profile.recommendation: Human-authored source material required for book_design_card generation. All source chapters require reprocessing with functioning LLM before aggregation into volume-level and book-level analysis.

risk_patterns: {'pattern_id': 'universal_llm_failure', 'severity': 'critical', 'affected_scope': 'entire_source', 'description': 'All 383 chapters across 16 volumes returned LLM unavailable fallback stubs with zero confidence. No story content, design mechanics, or craft observations extractable.', 'impact': 'book_design_card cannot be constructed from empty source data; all structural fields remain null or empty', 'mitigation_required': 'Source material must be reprocessed with functioning LLM distillation pipeline before book_design_card generation can succeed'}
